{{#for group in archive.groups}}

{{group.label}}

    {{#for post in group.items}}
  • {{post.title}} {{post.published_at}}
    • {{/for}}
{{/for}}
{{#if pagination.has_multiple_pages}}
{{#if pagination.has_prev}}Previous{{/if}} {{#for page in pagination.pages}}{{page.number}}{{/for}} {{#if pagination.has_next}}Next{{/if}}
{{/if}}
